normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Policy 1.22 - Construction Management Plans
scope_summary: Establishes when the City of Melville will condition development approvals to require a Construction Management Plan (CMP) and what the CMP must contain. It applies to all 'major developments' (more than 10 dwellings or more than 2,000 m2 of non-residential floor space, as defined in LPP 1.1) and any other development the City considers warrants a CMP. Content requirements cover site plans, stakeholder engagement and complaints management, protection of footpaths/verges/City assets (including dilapidation reports and street tree protection), worksite parking and delivery management, environmental management (noise, dust, vibration, stormwater, dewatering, hazardous materials), site storage, cranes, staging and compliance.
